author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/tools/file/notebook.rs::apply_replace: index == cells.len() is now silently promoted to apply_insert (CC parity). Promotion requires cell_type since the new cell needs a kind; missing cell_type yields a specific error that names the missing field rather than the generic out-of-bounds. Index strictly past len still errors. Replaced the pinned test with three split tests: _at_len_without_cell_type_errors, _at_len_with_cell_type_appends, _strictly_past_end_still_errors. 1821/1821 lib tests pass.
